$description: Component tokens for the Mobile Tag Group component - a layout container that arranges multiple Tag components in a horizontal row. Supports 4 sizes (xs, sm, md, lg) and a Multiple axis (single tag vs. many tags with an optional overflow '+N' counter and an optional 'add' tag). Tag Group only owns container layout tokens (direction, alignment, gap between tags); every pill inside - including the '+N' overflow counter and the 'add' tag - is a nested Tag component that carries its own tokens (see tag.json). Figma Reference: Node ID 5804-50066

$component.name: Tag Group
$component.description: A mobile layout container that groups multiple Tag components together in a single horizontal row. The gap between tags scales with the selected size. Used to display a set of related tags such as filters, categories, or selected values, with an optional overflow counter ('+N') and an optional add-tag control - both of which are themselves Tag instances with their own tokens.
$component.structure: Horizontal flex container, center-aligned, with a size-dependent gap between child Tag components. Children (individual tags, the '+N' overflow counter tag, and the 'add' tag) are nested Tag components and are not styled by Tag Group.

container.$comment: Container layout tokens for the tag group - flex direction, alignment, and the gap between child Tag components per size

direction.description: Mobile tag group flex direction - tags laid out horizontally - row

alignment.description: Mobile tag group cross-axis alignment - tags vertically centered - items-center

gap.$comment: Gap between adjacent Tag components - scales with size

xs.description: Mobile tag group gap between tags for xs size - 4xs - 2px

sm.description: Mobile tag group gap between tags for sm size - 3xs - 4px

md.description: Mobile tag group gap between tags for md size - 2xs - 6px

lg.description: Mobile tag group gap between tags for lg size - xs - 8px
